# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

properties([
    parameters([
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified"', description: 'Command to build the project'),
        string(name: 'TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No test command specified"', description: 'Command to run tests'),
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No deployment command specified"', description: 'Command to deploy the project'),
        string(name: 'PRE_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run before build (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run after build (optional)'),
        string(name: 'PRE_TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run before tests (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_TEST_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run after tests (optional)'),
        string(name: 'PRE_DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run before deployment (optional)'),
        string(name: 'POST_DEPLOY_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Command to run after deployment (optional)'),
        string(name: 'WORKING_DIRECTORY', defaultValue: '.', description: 'Working directory for commands'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_BUILD', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip build stage'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_TEST', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip test stage'),
        booleanParam(name: 'SKIP_DEPLOYMENT', defaultValue: false, description: 'Skip deployment stage'),
        booleanParam(name: 'FAIL_ON_TEST_ERROR', defaultValue: true, description: 'Fail pipeline if tests fail'),
        booleanParam(name: 'FAIL_ON_BUILD_ERROR', defaultValue: true, description: 'Fail pipeline if build fails'),
        choice(name: 'SHELL_TYPE', choices: ['sh', 'bash', 'zsh'], description: 'Shell to use for commands'),
        text(name: 'ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES', defaultValue: '', description: 'Environment variables (KEY=VALUE format, one per line)'),
        string(name: 'TIMEOUT_MINUTES', defaultValue: '60', description: 'Pipeline timeout in minutes')
    ])
])

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    options {
        timeout(time: params.TIMEOUT_MINUTES.toInteger(), unit: 'MINUTES')
        timestamps()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '10'))
    }
    
    environment {
        WORKSPACE_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}"
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Setup Environment') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Setting up environment..."
                    echo "Working Directory: ${params.WORKING_DIRECTORY}"
                    echo "Shell Type: ${params.SHELL_TYPE}"
                    
                    if (params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES?.trim()) {
                        echo "Custom Environment Variables:"
                        params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES.split('\n').each { line ->
                            if (line.trim()) {
                                echo "  ${line}"
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() && !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Pre-Build Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.PRE_BUILD_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Build') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Build Command..."
                    try {
                        executeCommand(params.BUILD_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Build failed: ${e.message}"
                        if (params.FAIL_ON_BUILD_ERROR) {
                            error("Build stage failed")
                        } else {
                            unstable("Build stage failed but continuing")
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Build') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND?.trim() && !params.SKIP_BUILD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Post-Build Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.POST_BUILD_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_TEST_COMMAND?.trim() && !params.SKIP_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Pre-Test Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.PRE_TEST_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Test') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Test Command..."
                    try {
                        executeCommand(params.TEST_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                    } catch (Exception e) {
                        echo "Tests failed: ${e.message}"
                        if (params.FAIL_ON_TEST_ERROR) {
                            error("Test stage failed")
                        } else {
                            unstable("Test stage failed but continuing")
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Test') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_TEST_COMMAND?.trim() && !params.SKIP_TEST }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Post-Test Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.POST_TEST_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Pre-Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { params.PRE_DEPLOY_COMMAND?.trim() && !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Pre-Deploy Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.PRE_DEPLOY_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Deployment Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.DEPLOYMENT_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
        
        stage('Post-Deploy') {
            when {
                expression { params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMAND?.trim() && !params.SKIP_DEPLOYMENT }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Post-Deploy Command..."
                    executeCommand(params.POST_DEPLOY_COMMAND, params.WORKING_DIRECTORY, params.SHELL_TYPE, params.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES)
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    post {
        success {
            echo "Pipeline completed successfully!"
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed!"
        }
        unstable {
            echo "Pipeline completed with warnings!"
        }
        always {
            echo "Pipeline execution finished"
        }
    }
}

def executeCommand(String command, String workingDir, String shellType, String envVars) {
    if (!command?.trim()) {
        echo "No command to execute"
        return
    }
    
    dir(workingDir) {
        def envList = []
        if (envVars?.trim()) {
            envVars.split('\n').each { line ->
                if (line.trim() && line.contains('=')) {
                    envList.add(line.trim())
                }
            }
        }
        
        withEnv(envList) {
            if (shellType == 'bash') {
                sh script: "#!/bin/bash\n${command}", returnStdout: false
            } else if (shellType == 'zsh') {
                sh script: "#!/bin/zsh\n${command}", returnStdout: false
            } else {
                sh script: command, returnStdout: false
            }
        }
    }
}
